nasb.text: “Come, let us return to the Lord. For He has torn us, but He will heal us; He has wounded us, but He will bandage us.

esv.text: “Come, let us return to the Lord; for he has torn us, that he may heal us; he has struck us down, and he will bind us up.

cnv.text: “來吧！讓我們回轉歸向耶和華； 因為，他雖然撕裂了我們，但必定醫治我們； 他雖然擊傷了我們，卻必替我們裹傷。

ccb.text: 来吧，让我们归向耶和华！ 祂撕裂我们，也必医治我们； 祂击打我们，也必为我们裹伤。
